synergies.teammate_name: The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu
synergies.reason: **The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu** is the core Heishou Pack enabler — his passives heal SP and command allies that **Return to the battlefield** to use free Unopposed Attacks, stack **Life from Death**, and amplify **Heishou Bolus Contamination** for the whole faction.
'Swordplay of the Homeland' inflicts Poise via the support passive — helps reach 30+ Poise thresholds on key skills.
'Slayer' inflicts Poise via the support passive — helps reach 30+ Poise thresholds on key skills.

synergies.teammate_name: Heishou Pack - Wu Branch Adept Yi Sang

core_idea: Heishou Pack - Si Branch Gregor is a Damage Dealer / Status Specialist — **Poise** fighter — **20 Potency** for guaranteed crits. **Heishou substitute** — when this identity is killed, your **backup unit** Substitutes in and continues the rotation.
playstyle_guide:
- Assign a **backup identity** for this sinner — if this unit dies, the backup **Substitutes** in and can pick up Heishou passive value on entry.
- Pair with **Heishou Pack** teammates (and **The Lord of Hongyuan** if available) so Return-to-field procs and faction passives stack across substitutions.
- Skills check **5+ Rupture** — favour those coins when stacked.
- Ramp **Poise Potency** to **20** before your heavy chain.
- **Guard: Reversal Kick** grants 3 **Serpent Arm** at Combat Start — use the defense slot to prep buffs before your attack chain.

**S1 — Snake Fang** (BP 3, CP +4, x2): rolls — low 3, high 11 (Extremely Low).
- Coin Power +1 for every 10 (Poise on self + Rupture on target) (max 2); [On Use] Gain +2 Poise Count
- Inflict 1 Rupture; [On Crit] If this unit has Serpent Arm, inflict +1 Rupture Count

**S2 — Blindsiding Cleave** (BP 4, CP +4, x3): rolls — low 4, high 16 (Slightly Low).
- Coin Power +1 for every 10 (Poise on self + Rupture on target) (max 2); [Clash Win] Inflict +2 Rupture Count; [Clash Win] Gain +2 Poise Count
- Peak output requires both conditions: Inflict 2 Rupture | [On Hit] At 30+ Poise, consume 10 Poise on self to Reuse Coin once (1 time max).

**S3 — Serpentshear Puncturing Arm** (BP 8, CP +14, x1): rolls — low 8, high 22 (High / Extremely High stacked).
- Deal +5% damage for every (Poise on self + Rupture on target) (max 150%); If this unit has Serpent Arm, deal +75% Damage on Critical Hit; [On Hit] Reduce Deathrite — Venom — on target by 2; [On Crit] Reduce Deathrite — Venom — on target by 3; [On Hit] Inflict Deathrite — Venom —

Combat passive — **Heishou Mutation [Si]**: If target has Deathrite — Venom —, deal +5% damage for every Serpent Arm on self (max 15%).
  - If this unit reduced the target's Deathrite — Venom — down to 0 Stack, gain 1 Pierce DMG Up next turn (max 2).

Combat passive — **Like a Serpent: Flexible, Elastic, and Unpredictable**: If this unit is killed in this Encounter: every turn, at Combat Start, apply 2 Poise to the Substituting Identity of the earliest Deploym….

Defense skill — **Guard: Reversal Kick**: Clashable Guard.
  - [Combat Start] Gain 3 Serpent Arm next turn.
  - [On Use] At 10+ Poise Count, Coin Power +1.
team_suggestions: **Heishou Pack** composition — anchor the team with **The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu**; his passives heal returning allies, command free Unopposed Attacks when backups **Return to the battlefield**, and stack **Life from Death** and **Heishou Bolus Contamination** for the faction. Same-faction teammates provide additional passive synergy where available.

- **The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu**: **The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu** is the core Heishou Pack enabler — his passives heal SP and command allies that **Return to the battlefield** to use free Unopposed Attacks, stack **Life from Death**, and amplify **Heishou Bolus Contamination** for the whole faction.
- **Blade Lineage Mentor Meursault**: 'Swordplay of the Homeland' inflicts Poise via the support passive — helps reach 30+ Poise thresholds on key skills.
- **Blade Lineage Salsu Sinclair**: 'Slayer' inflicts Poise via the support passive — helps reach 30+ Poise thresholds on key skills.

Same-faction teammates provide additional passive synergy where available.
